attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-ENT-01-00203) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-ENT-01 bucket; run ingest with --reseq.

case_id uses partition code ENT (otolaryngology, the natural home for laryngitis) but specialty_tags is ['RESP'] because the 00 schema's specialty enum does not include ENT — same id-vs-metadata pattern as the live SPEC-OPHTH/['OPHTHAL'] cases (metadata is authoritative; the id is an opaque name). Reviewer may reclassify.
Age not stated in source — inferred as 38 (working adult, 72 kg, family living, transient occupational vocal demands). Please confirm on clinician review.
Sex at birth not stated in source — inferred as male with no source signal; please confirm/correct on clinician review.
Geographic context not stated (source location 'private residence') — omitted rather than guessed.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source was an in-person after-hours clinician visit (oropharyngeal examination, chest auscultation, indirect laryngoscopy, measured vitals). Those clinician-only findings are sealed in 10.telehealth_limits and 11 (physical_sign/investigation_result); the presentation layer was de-anchored to a pre-diagnosis patient account.

Tier calibration: correct_baseline_tier T1 (self-care with routine GP backstop), minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1 — this is a common self-limiting condition; over-triage to ED/000 in the absence of airway red flags is scored as over-triage (over_triage_threshold T3), not caution. A narrow airway safety-net (ESC-001, 000 threshold) is mandatory. The narrow T3 telehealth uplift does NOT apply because the epiglottitis red flags are patient-reportable and explicitly negative in this note.

Differential SNOMED codes (epiglottitis 90458007, bacterial tracheitis 428544005, vocal cord nodule/polyp 51935006) and the paracetamol AMT candidate (387517004, a SNOMED substance code used as an AMT placeholder) are low-confidence candidates pending terminology-receipt verification.
Source MBS billing references (585-600) are administrative, not clinical guidelines — not recorded as guideline_references.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
